parts.text: I want to promote EMP1001

content.text: Error executing tool get_entra_user_details: All connection attempts failed

hr_intake_agent.name: hr_intake_agent

function_declarations.description:
Simulates querying Microsoft Entra ID via Graph API to retrieve employee directory details.

    Use this to pre-populate employee details (displayName, mail, mobilePhone, officeLocation, jobTitle)
    using their Employee ID in real-time (< 3 seconds).
function_declarations.name: get_entra_user_details

function_declarations.description:
Simulates creating a personnel intake ticket in Jira Service Management (Atlassian) for the HR Review Queue.

    Call this tool when the Store Manager confirms and submits a completed personnel change request (promotion, transfer, pay adjustment, termination).

    Args:
        summary: A descriptive title/summary of the request (e.g., 'Promotion Request: Alex Mercer (EMP1001) to Store Leader').
        details: A dictionary containing all change parameters (e.g., jobTitle, jobCode, hourlyPayRate, effectiveDate, storeNumber, justification, policyFlags).

    Returns:
        A dictionary indicating success, including the created Jira Ticket Key (e.g. 'HR-12345') and Status.
function_declarations.name: submit_hr_intake_request

function_declarations.description:
Simulates sending progress milestone notifications to the store manager or employee.

    Use this to notify managers via their preferred channel (Teams, SMS, or Email) of intake progress and ticketing milestones.

    Args:
        recipient_phone_or_email: The email address, phone number, or Teams identifier to send the message to.
        channel: The notification delivery channel. Allowed values: 'Teams', 'SMS', 'Email'.
        message: The plain-language notification message content.

    Returns:
        A dictionary indicating delivery status.
function_declarations.name: send_notification

function_declarations.description: Retrieves a store employee's current job title, primary job code, manager name, and active store location number.
function_declarations.name: get_employee_employment_profile

function_declarations.description: Retrieves exact compensation markers including hourly base rate, pay frequency, and alphanumeric pay grade assignments.
function_declarations.name: get_employee_compensation

function_declarations.description: Provides standard HR-configured payment bounding intervals (minimum and maximum pay rates) assigned to a given job code.
function_declarations.name: validate_pay_thresholds

function_declarations.description: Collects lists of active, permitted corporate Job Profiles and structural store organizational locations.
function_declarations.name: get_valid_jobs_and_locations
